base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of koopa_troopa_walk — a character (minion) from 1985 super mario bros. head bobs up/down as legs alternate. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 2-frame walk cycle — head bobs up/down as legs alternate; available in green (original) + red (stays on platform) variants
